description: A farmer needs to compile financial documents to apply for an annual operating loan.

nodes.task_description: Generate a balance sheet from the farm's accounting software.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the balance sheet.

nodes.task_description: Generate a cash flow projection for the upcoming year based on planned crops and historical expenses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a detailed cash flow projection.

nodes.task_description: Compile the generated reports into a single loan application package.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a zip file with all the required financial documents.
